name: Moo Shu-Style Grilled Chicken
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup plum jam or hoison sauce
1 red bell pepper, cut in thin strips
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl of water, soak the scallions until ready to cook.
2. In a small bowl, combine the soy sauce, plum jam (or hoison sauce), ketchup, vinegar, and five-spice powder.
3. Transfer half of the plum jam mixture into a measuring cup and spread onto the chicken breasts. Set the chicken aside.
4. Using the remaining mixture, spread one side of the tortillas with the plum jam mixture and set aside.
5. Preheat the grill to medium heat. Spray the rack off the grill with nonstick cooking spray.
6. Grill the chicken and scallions, covered, for 3 minutes or until the scallions are cooked through once, then for an additional 5 minutes or until cooked through.
7. Remove the chicken from the grill and grill the tortillas, jam-sides up, for 20 seconds to warm through.
8. Thinly slice the chicken on the diagonal.
9. Divide evenly, place the chicken, scallions, and bell peppers on the jam side of the tortillas.
10. Place 2 filled tortillas on each of 4 plates and serve open-faced or rolled.
